gigapan.description:
Some German words are easier to understand than others.

Kultur Fur Alle, or Culture For All, is easy to translate.  And it is inspiring.

It is deeply inspiring to be here in the Museumsquartier.  There is so much 
happening, so many interesting people creating and curating and studying
art and culture and social movements.

I love it.

But German is not yet my total friend!  I happen to now know that an Ausfahrt is just an exit.  But for a long time, even now, I see a word which is to fart as au juice is to 'juice.'
